title: about me
text: MarkDown Basics

title: Melanie Anderson
text:
Business Analytics Major, Finance Minor, Data Science Certificate.

mel.anderson4216@gmail.com | My LinkedIn page



Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics 2020-2026 Brigham Young University-Idaho (Rexburg, ID) - Cumulative GPA: 3.96 - Tools & Technologies: Excel (VLOOKUP, PivotTables, charting), MySQL, RStudio, Python





Ballet Etude (Rexburg, ID) - Built and maintained a grant and sponsor tracking database, improving efficiency in identifying and pursuing funding opportunities. - Conducted financial and data analysis to align grant applications with organizational budgets and compliance requirements. - Collaborated with a team of 4 to identify qualified funding sources and align proposals with sponsor requirements.



Brigham Young University-Idaho (Rexburg, ID) - Applied Excel to create models and dashboards that broke down complex problems into data-driven solutions. - Guided students through complex quantitative problems, emphasizing logical reasoning and data-driven approaches. - Strengthened students’ problem-solving skills through collaborative learning.



Ophthalmic Billing Solutions (Ogden, UT) - Implemented structured templates that streamlined reporting workflows and reduced processing errors. - Cleaned, validated, and organized large volumes of insurance claim data in Excel, ensuring accuracy and data integrity. - Extracted, processed, and analyzed claim outcomes to support reporting and financial tracking.






The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints (Tampa, FL) - Delivered structured presentations and workshops, adapting content to diverse audiences and effectively communicating key insights. - Coordinated schedules, set measurable goals, and tracked progress to align team activities with organizational objectives. - Collaborated with individuals from diverse backgrounds, applying strong communication skills to build alignment and trust.

text: Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics 2020-2026 Brigham Young University-Idaho (Rexburg, ID) - Cumulative GPA: 3.96 - Tools & Technologies: Excel (VLOOKUP, PivotTables, charting), MySQL, RStudio, Python
